description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compare Annotation that runs on push to master and next-minor-release branches and on pull requests to these branches. For the oncokb/oncokb-annotator repository, set up a macOS job that checks out the code, installs Python 3.8, and installs dependencies from requirements files. Run flake8 linting, then annotate data using MafAnnotator, FusionAnnotator, CnaAnnotator, and ClinicalDataAnnotator with ONCOKB_API_TOKEN and ONCOKB_OAUTH_TOKEN from secrets. Finally, compare the annotation results with those from the master branch.
